summary: Anonymous user live game in market - Feed Select
description:
GIVEN the user is anonymous
AND there is a game scheduled or in-progress in the viewing market of the user

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the game tile with a Blackout pill
steps.result:
THEN video feed buttons are not displayed
AND the following blackout messaging is displayed in the Feed Select modal: 

____.TV In-Market Entitlement Required   

____.TV logo

Your current package does not entitle you to in-market ___s games. Link your [MLB.TV|http://MLB.TV] account to a participating pay TV provider at [mlb.com/commerce/mvpd/rockies|http://mlb.com/commerce/mvpd/rockies] or upgrade to a ____.TV package at [mlb.com/live-stream-games/subscribe/rockies|http://mlb.com/live-stream-games/subscribe/rockies] to watch this game. 

Full Game Access

‘Upgrade [MLB.TV|http://MLB.TV]’ - button which links to Subscriptions/Plans page
